languages.text: "Что?!" {n}Кажется, сенешаль на мгновение теряет дар речи.{/n} "Я немедленно распоряжусь о начале поисков! Мы отыщим мерзавца и пропажу, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: "Что?!" {n}Кажется, сенешаль на мгновение теряет дар речи.{/n} "Я немедленно распоряжусь о начале поисков! Мы отыщим мерзавца и пропажу, Лорд-капитан!"

languages.text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Что?!" {n}Кажется, сенешаль на мгновение теряет дар речи.{/n} "Я немедленно распоряжусь о начале поисков! Мы отыщим мерзавца и пропажу, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"
"What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"
"What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: “什么！”{n}总领似乎一瞬间失去了言语能力。{/n}“我这就下令展开搜查！我们一定会找到那个混蛋，寻回失物，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “什么！”{n}总领似乎一瞬间失去了言语能力。{/n}“我这就下令展开搜查！我们一定会找到那个混蛋，寻回失物，舰长大人！”

languages.text: « Comment ?! {n}Le sénéchal se retrouve quelques instants sans voix.{/n} Je vais donner l'ordre qu'on lance immédiatement des recherches ! Nous allons retrouver ce scélérat et l'objet volé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: « Comment ?! {n}Le sénéchal se retrouve quelques instants sans voix.{/n} Je vais donner l'ordre qu'on lance immédiatement des recherches ! Nous allons retrouver ce scélérat et l'objet volé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: «¡¿Cómo?!». {n}El Senescal parece enmudecer por un momento.{/n} «¡Ordenaré que empiece el registro de inmediato! Encontraremos a ese canalla y su propiedad robada, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: «¡¿Cómo?!». {n}El Senescal parece enmudecer por un momento.{/n} «¡Ordenaré que empiece el registro de inmediato! Encontraremos a ese canalla y su propiedad robada, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: "Ne?" {n}Seneşal, sanki bir an için konuşma yetisini kaybediyor.{/n} "Derhâl arama yapılmasını emredeceğim! O alçağın ve kayıp eşyanın izini bulacağız Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Ne?" {n}Seneşal, sanki bir an için konuşma yetisini kaybediyor.{/n} "Derhâl arama yapılmasını emredeceğim! O alçağın ve kayıp eşyanın izini bulacağız Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: "Was!" {n}Der Truchsess scheint einen Moment lang die Sprache zu verlieren.{/n} "Ich werde umgehend eine Suche anordnen! Wir werden den Halunken und den fehlenden Gegenstand finden, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Was!" {n}Der Truchsess scheint einen Moment lang die Sprache zu verlieren.{/n} "Ich werde umgehend eine Suche anordnen! Wir werden den Halunken und den fehlenden Gegenstand finden, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: 「何ですと！」{n}家令は一瞬、言葉を失ったようだ。{/n}「直ちに捜索を開始するよう命じます！ その悪党と失われた品を、必ず突き止めてみせます、ロード・キャプテン！」
languages.original_text: "What!" {n}The Seneschal seems to lose the power of speech for a moment.{/n} "I will order a search to begin immediately! We will track down the scoundrel and the missing item, Lord Captain!"
